sql_query.query: SELECT id, name, contribution_amount, currency, seats, status FROM circles WHERE invite_code = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO memberships (id, circle_id, user_id, payout_position, has_been_paid, role, created_at, updated_at) SELECT $1, c.id, $2, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(payout_position) FROM memberships WHERE circle_id = c.id), 0) + 1, false, 'member', $3::timestamptz, $4::timestamptz FROM circles c WHERE c.invite_code = $5
INSERT INTO activities (id, circle_id, user_id, actor_name, type, message, created_at) SELECT $1, c.id, $2, $3, 'member_joined', $4, $5::timestamptz FROM circles c WHERE c.invite_code = $6
SELECT id AS circle_id, name, pot_balance, current_cycle, status FROM circles WHERE invite_code = $1
